Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9000 "MICRODOT-9000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Microdot.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The game does not hit $9000 when run because the game was actually frozen using a Trilogic Expert cartridge. Therefore, you must set the breakpoint on $A747 for dumping.
